title: Run first reviewed Gemini maintenance dry run
goal: Run one manual artifact-only Gemini maintenance scan over the curated evidence packet and review signal quality before any recurrence is considered.

acceptance.assertion: The run stores Markdown and JSON artifacts only and does not create issues, PRs, comments, tasks, queue mutations, dispatches or runtime actions.
acceptance.verifier: run artifact and GitHub diff review

acceptance.assertion: The dry run is reviewed for useful findings, false positives, missing evidence, hallucinated refs and overclaiming.
The dry run does not enable a schedule or recurrence by itself.
Any follow-up remains a proposal or Frontier candidate until Bureau review and explicit apply gate.
